query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'search_queries' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'regulation_sources' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;

SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'regulation_sources' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
